message:
fix: migrate mail/daemon/TUI from type-based to label-based bead queries (gt-uxwyw)

Replace --type=agent/convoy/message/queue with --label=gt:agent/gt:convoy/
gt:message/gt:queue across mail router, daemon lifecycle, web fetcher, and
TUI convoy views. For bd create commands, move type to gt:message label.
Add backward-compatible label+type checks where beads are validated after fetch.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
